subject: docs(research): comprehensive forecasting models research for actuals-first pivot
body:
Research document covering the architectural shift from budget-first to
actuals-first paradigm. Covers hybrid forecasting approach (deterministic
recurring items + statistical variable spending), Holt's method with
day-of-week seasonality, prediction accuracy metrics (MAE over MAPE for
daily data), confidence intervals, data model changes, import wizard
redesign, and single-screen UI architecture.

Tags: research, forecasting, architecture, prediction
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: forecasting-pivot
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CuU4JLJcWUf92LLHXcqyK8
title: comprehensive forecasting models research for actuals-first pivot
